name: Green Tomato Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely grind all vegetables.
2. Mix the ground vegetables and salt together. Cover and let stand for 12 to 18 hours.
3. Drain the vegetables and rinse them. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Heat until boiling, then reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 3 minutes.
5. Pack the simmering mixture into hot jars, leaving ½ inch headspace. Seal the jars and process for 10 minutes in a boiling water bath.
6. Makes 5 - 6 pints. Vegetables can be chopped if preferred.
